title: Chita Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Chita, with a Z-Score of -3.60. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Chita are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The cold snap has led to a high Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 13.6 GG, indicating a substantial need for heating. 
 The humidity level is at 63%, with a gentle wind speed of 4.1 km/h, which may exacerbate the cold conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
